title: astragalus niveus
intro: Astragalus niveus, also known as snow lotus, is a perennial plant species native to the high-altitude regions of the Tibetan Plateau. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Astragalus niveus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus niveus is commonly prepared as a decoction, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
